steps.title: Identify what 'prefers...to other places' requires
steps.content: The claim demands a quotation that compares the narrator's experiences elsewhere to her hometown — not just praise for one.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: C explicitly contrasts “journeying in my life” with experiences “within the borders of my native town,” declaring “I have never taken greater delight than” in the hometown — a direct comparison proving preference. A, B, and D praise the hometown but contain no comparison to other places. That matches choice C — C is correct.
